meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: User Onboarding: A Freelancer’s Guide to No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Overcome the lack of marketing skills with high-conversion user onboarding. Master this intermediate checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing department; you need an automated onboarding flow that sells for you. By embedding product-led growth directly into your app’s first-run experience, you convert users into buyers instantly. Use this checklist to automate customer education, reduce churn, and turn your product into its own best salesperson.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is that your best code often dies in the shadows because nobody knows how to use it. You’ve mastered the stack, but without a marketing budget or a growth team, your client’s user retention looks like a sinking ship. The silence from your users isn't just lack of interest—it's a lack of guidance.

But here is the secret: you don't need to be a copywriter to drive growth. By architecting high-intent, automated onboarding directly into the product, you bypass the need for traditional marketing. We’re going to use Antigravity and Claude Code to build a frictionless, self-selling user experience that handles the selling while you sleep.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that provides immediate value to the user. We will map this to a trigger-based UI prompt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core user journey of a SaaS app and identify the one action that correlates most with long-term retention. Provide a structure for a 3-step guided tour.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Identify the core value metric for this codebase and suggest a 3-step onboarding flow'

steps.title: Build the Interactive Checklist
steps.description: Create an in-app progress bar that gamifies the setup process, reducing cognitive load for new users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for an onboarding progress checklist that tracks user completion status and triggers a celebratory animation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Create a React ProgressTracker component that tracks 3 onboarding steps and saves progress to local storage'

steps.title: Automate Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Implement non-intrusive, context-aware tooltips that explain features only when the user hovers over them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Tooltip component that uses data-attributes to fetch help text from a centralized JSON configuration file.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Implement a global Tooltip provider and hook to display contextual help throughout the dashboard'

steps.title: Implement Triggered Email Loops
steps.description: Connect your onboarding flow to an automated sequence to re-engage users who drop off before finishing the setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Node.js service that monitors user progress and sends a personalized email if the onboarding checklist is not completed within 24 hours.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Create an onboarding-monitor.js service that triggers email alerts via Postmark API if progress is < 100%'

steps.title: Analytics for Growth Loops
steps.description: Add event tracking to your onboarding steps to identify exactly where users abandon the product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add segment.io tracking events to all onboarding components, capturing step completion and exit rates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Add analytics tracking events to the Onboarding component and the ProgressTracker'

pro_tips: Never show a tour on the first load; wait for the user to interact with the first primary element to avoid overwhelm.
Use 'Empty States' as onboarding opportunities—fill your empty dashboards with 'Get Started' buttons rather than blank screens.
Offer a 'Skip' button for power users; forced onboarding is the fastest way to drive away experienced talent.
A/B test your onboarding copy; even one word change in your CTA can increase completion rates by 15%.
Treat your onboarding flow as a product feature; version it, test it, and iterate on it just like your core codebase.
content.next_steps: Run your new onboarding flow through a user testing session using a tool like Maze, then iterate based on where they click.
content.conversion_block: Stop building features that nobody uses. Start building journeys that turn users into loyal customers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
